description:

————————————————————————————

“ Radiant_Day is one of the operatives in The Days Union. They are also affiliated with other groups like the Cult of Vin and Happy Country. He has PTSD from his experience of having a Night Coalition flag pole stabbed through his head as a Dawn before he joined the Days Union . ”

) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ ) ) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

As his name suggests, Radiant_Day is often seen being positive and radiant. He's seen getting along with his fellow comrades, specifically Unstable Day whom he affectionally refers to as his 'brother figure'. He is very protective over people and has stated he will go extreme lengths to keep people safe, even if he wasn't programmed to be that way.
